NAVAREA XIX 53/20

SEISMIC OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS BY S/V RAMFORM TETHYS FROM 03 JUNE 2020 UNTIL 31 JULY 2020.
TOWING 14 X 4000 METERS LONG CABLES IN AREA BORDERED BY FOLLOWING POSITION :
 
A. 71-13.43N 022-48.20E
B. 71-18.52N 023-01.15E
C. 71-30.53N 022-13.57E
D. 71-13.16N 021-31.50E
E. 71-04.40N 022-05.27E

SUPPORT VESSELS IN ATTENDANCE ARE M/V OCEAN FORTUNE AND M/V THOR FREYJA.
WIDE BERTH IS REQUESTED  5 NM ASTERN, 3 NM PORT AND STARBOARD AND AHEAD,
VESSELS CAN BE CONTACTED ON VHF 16 AND VHF 72
